title: Establish Visual Hierarchy in Info Panel
description: Make RUN button 2x size with stronger glow. Reduce secondary controls to compact icon row.

changes.what: Increase RUN button padding/font-size, add stronger glow. Make Quick Test, Clear, Hint buttons more compact in a flex row.
Wrap secondary action buttons in a flex row container

acceptance: RUN button is visually dominant (larger, stronger glow)
Secondary buttons (Quick Test, Clear) are compact and in a row
Visual hierarchy clear: primary action stands out
